titleStmt.title: SII 22.360: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 360. (A.R. No. 360 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SECOND PRĀKĀRA JAṬ. VĪRAPĀṆḌYADĒVA—15th YEAR (A.D. 1267—68)

summary.p: The king is given the attribute “who took Īḻam, Koṅgu and Chōḷamaṇḍalam and after conquering the powerful king was pleased to perform the anointment of heroes and victors at Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr”. The inscription registers a sale, as tirunāmattukkāṇi to the temple at Tirunalakkuṉṟam, of three vēli of puravu (tax-paying ?) land at Viśalūr by the Ūrār of that place, at the instance of two officers of the king (Rājagōmuṟṟuvar) Vāṇādharāyar and Gāṅgēyar and on the intercession of the Iraṇḍukarai-nāṭṭār, for 64,000 kāśu. The circumstances of the sale are given, from which it would seem that the Ūrār had been at default for a long period in the payment of the kaḍamai-kīḻiṟai and had also to account for 50,000 kāśu which had evidently been deposited with them out of the amount intended for the renovation of the temple. This is probably the sale-proceeds of the transaction recorded in No. 352. A supplementary sale deed is added to this record figuring the Nāṭṭār as an agency and party for the execution of the sale.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī Īḻamuṅ koṅkuñ coḻamaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭu vallāṉai veṉṟu perumpaṟṟappu[ liyūril virābhi] ṣekamum vicaiyābhiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiya śrīvirapāṇṭiya tevaṟkku yāṇṭu 15vatu koṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkai koṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Aṇṇalvāyil kūṟṟattu vicalūrāyicainta Ūrom Eṅkaḷūr perumā
kkāṭāy neṭunāḷ nāyaṉār kaṭamai kiḻiṟaiyum Iḻantu potukaccitey Iraṇṭukaraināṭṭu nāṭṭavarum nāṭupiṭitta vaippūruṭaiyārai kūṭṭa kuḷamum yile paṭivarampum Eṟaṭṭu veḷḷāṟṟaiyum kuḷattile vilakkikuṭuttu Uḻukku Uḻavāka kaikkoṇṭu Uḻutu Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku kaṭamaikiḻiṟai ṟkaveṇumeṉṟu veṇṭikkoṇṭu Ivar Uḻavukku Uḻutu potukiṟa Aḷa
vilum nāṅkaḷ Eṅkaḷ kāṇi nāṅkaḷ paṟṟi kaṭamaikiḻiṟai yiṟuttup potāmaiyāle rājakomuṟṟuvamāṉa tevar vāṉādharāyarum Uṭaiyār kāṅke yarum nāṭupaṟṟippukuntu patiṉālāvatukku Uṅkaḷūrkaḷukku Uṅkaḷ kāṇi nilaṅkaḷ niṅkaḷe paṟṟikkoṇṭu puravu viḻukkāṭṭuppaṭi poṉvari viṉiyokam nāyanāṟ kaṭamaikiḻiṟaiyum taraveṇumeṉṟu colli Eṅkaḷukku Iṟukka niścayitta kācukku veṟu pokkil
lāmaiyāl Eṅkaḷūr puravunilam Āṟuveliyil Oṉṟupāti nila munṟuveli Iṉṉila muṉṟu velikkum perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellaiyāvatu naṭuvil kuḻumi teṟke lāṟṟukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai veḷḷāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kaikkoṭṭeriyāṉa kuṭikāṭṭukku nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakallukkum cikaranallūrār Ellaikkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
kuḷakkaraikku teṟku Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilattil Uḷḷūr nāyanār tirunākiśvaramuṭaiya nāyanār tevatāṉamu Ammaṉavar nilamum nikki niṉṟa nila munṟu veliyum Ittāl vanta kuḷam Iraṇṭilum kuḻumi muṉṟilum Oṉṟupāti peṟakkaṭavatākavum Ivviḻukkāṭu pācippāṭṭamum Innilattu meṉokkiṉa maramum kiṇokkiṉa kiṇaṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭiṉavum Innā
yanāṟku tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka koyil Uḻavumuṟṟūṭṭā raḻittuk kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicaiñca vilaipporuḷ Innāyanār śrīpaṇṭārattu tirukkaṟṟaḷi ceyya Irunta kānāṭṭu mutalikaḷukku nāṅkaḷ kuṭuppatāna kācu 5 10000- m Eṅkaḷukku paricaṭṭamutalāka tanta kācu 4 1000 nāṭṭukkup paricaṭṭamutal kuṭuppatāṉa kācu [ 10000- m] Āka kācu 6 10000 4 1000 Ikkācu Aṟupattunālāyirattukkum
Ippuravunilam munṟuveliyum vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyanār koyil Āticaṇḍeśvaradevakanmi koyiṟkaṇakku śrī kāriyañ ceyvā Icaiñca Ūrom Eṅkaḷūr puravunilattu Oṉṟum Innilam muṉṟu velikkum kuḷam Iraṇṭilum kuḻumi munṟilum
Onṟupāti nirukkum pācippāṭṭam Ittāl vantana Ep peṟpaṭṭaṉavaiyiṟṟu nālāyiramume vilaiyāvutākavum Ituve vilaiyāvaṇap poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ celavolaiyāvatākavum Innilattukku veṭṭimuṭṭāvāḷ Eccoṟu kūṟṟarici kāṭṭak kaṭavomallavākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu
viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭu koyiṟkaṇakkar śrīkāriyañceyvārkaḷukkum Ūrāyicainta Ūrom Ippaṭikku kulatipa veḷāṉ kaimmāṭṭāmaiyyiṭṭu Ivai Aṟaṅkāttāṉ Eḻuttu celvaṉ piramaṉ taṟkuṟiyum miṭṭu putuvūr periyatevaṉ Eḻuttu .. ṣupplementary to the Above Is the following record
koṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkaiko yār tiruṉalak kuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇḍeśvarar devākaṉmi koyiṟkaṇakkaṟku nāṭṭu nāṭṭom piṭipāṭupaṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu tevatāṉam vicalūr neṭuṅkālam pāḻkiṭantu kaṭamaikiḻiṟai Iṟātapaṭiyāle vaippūruṭaiyār paṇṇiyār Uḻutu pontaṭattu
m vicalūrāyicainta Ūrār kāṇi tāṅkaḷ kaṭamai kiḻiṟai paṭiyāleyum piṉpu 10 4vatu rājagomuṟṟamāṉa tevar vāṇarāya devarum Uṭaiyār gāṅgeyarum Ivvūr nāṭṭuviḻukkāṭṭuppaṭi poṉvari nāyaṉāṟ kaṭamaikiḻiṟaiyum taraveṇumeṉṟu collukaiyil Ivvūr Iṟukka niccayitta kācukku Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār śrīpaṇṭārattut tiruk kiṟuṣi ceyyavum
Irunta nellum mutalikaḷukku vāṅkikkuṭuttu Innāyaṉārkku tirunāmattuk kāṇi koyiluḻavumuṟṟūṭṭāka vicalūr Ūravar viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam 3— li Innilam muṉṟuvelikkum Ivvūr viḻukkāṭu Ivvūr mutalikaḷ kāvukke kkaiyil Ivarkaḷukku perkku paṇṭārattu nāṅkaḷ vāṅki kuṭutta kācu 5 10000 Ikkācu Aimpatiṉāyirattukkum Ivūravar Eḻutikkuṭutta piramāṇa ppaṭi nila muṉṟuveli tirunā
mattukkāṇi yikkoyiluḻavu muṟṟūṭṭāyp pontakkaṭavatākavum In nilattukku Āṭtevai kūṟṟarici veṭṭimuṭṭāvāḷ Eṉṟu Inta vicalūr Ū kaṭavakaḷallavākavum nāṅkaḷ Innila parākavum nā nnilattukkup poṉvari viṉiyokan taraveṇumeṉṟu coṉṉamaiyil
mākavum Iṟukkaveṇṭil nāṭṭile Eṟaṭṭu Iṟukkakkaṭavomākavum Ippaṭikku kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi cammatittup piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭuttom tevarkaṉmi koyiṟkaṇakkuk koṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu Iraṇṭukaraināṭṭu nāṭṭom Ivai Aṇṇalvāyil kurukulattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu toḻaveḷāṉeḻuttu
putuvūr periyatevaṉeḻuttu colaiyerinta tirumaṉṟu poliyaniṉṟā ṉeḻuttu Ālattūr veḷāṉeḻuttu parampaiyūr nampuceyvāṉeḻuttu Iṭaṅ koṇṭāṉeḻuttu puṉṉaṅkuṭi centāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu cempiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu cikāṉaviccātirāyaṉeḻuttu ceramāṉ toḻa ṉeḻuttu Ivai kāñcikkuṟi virarājentiracoḻa veḷāṉeḻuttu
vayalakattu pūmālaiveḷā ṉeḻuttu cempiyataraiya ṉeḻuttu kāntanampi veḷḷattaraṅkaṉāṉa taṟkuṟikku Ūṟkaṇakku vayalakamuṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu veyammai kūttāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu meṉpalaveli tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu kaḻumaṉa tevaṉeḻuttu Irājendraveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Irāja ciṟṟampala vimaṉeḻuttu
Iṭaiyāṟṟūr pokkacaṉmaṉtāḻi yeḻuttu kāraiyūr mārāyaṉ piramāṇṭāṉeḻuttu taḻuttaṇiyattu viracoḻaveḷāṉeḻuttu vaḷavaṉ villava taraiyaṉeḻuttu Ollaiyūr maṅkalattu tiruccirāppaḷḷi Uṭaiyāṉeḻuttu ceṅkatir coḻamuventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Itu paṉmāheśva[ ra rakṣai] .
Digital edition of SII 22.360 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
